description: You are an autonomous vehicle simulation engineer at an automotive R&D lab. An AV test platform world is loaded in Webots. Update the vehicle's sensor suite to match the physical hardware specifications. Configure the 'front_camera' with a 640x480 resolution and the 'velodyne_lidar' with 16 scanning layers and a maximum range of 100 meters. Save the configured world file to /home/ga/Desktop/av_sensors_configured.wbt.

natural_language.prompt:
You are an autonomous vehicle simulation engineer. A Webots world is loaded with an AV test platform ('autonomous_vehicle') that has incorrectly configured sensors. You need to reconfigure the sensors to match the hardware specifications that will be deployed on the physical vehicle:

1. Find the front camera node (named 'front_camera') in the scene tree and set its resolution to width=640, height=480.

2. Find the LIDAR sensor (named 'velodyne_lidar') and configure it to match the Velodyne VLP-16 hardware specification: numberOfLayers=16 and maxRange=100.

3. The GPS sensor is already correctly configured — do not modify it.

After making all three changes, save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/av_sensors_configured.wbt using File > Save World As.
